heading: Interstate consolidations and mergers
label: 215a–1 Interstate consolidations and mergers
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (c), was subsequently amended, and subsec. (f) of section 1831u no longer defines the terms “home State” and “out-of-State bank”. However, such terms are defined elsewhere in that section.Section 1831u of this title
amendments: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (c), was subsequently amended, and subsec. (f) of section 1831u no longer defines the terms “home State” and “out-of-State bank”. However, such terms are defined elsewhere in that section.Section 1831u of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: A national bank may engage in a consolidation or merger under this subchapter with an out-of-State bank if the consolidation or merger is approved pursuant to .section 1831u of this title

children.heading: Scope of application
children.label: b Scope of application
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply with respect to any consolidation or merger before , unless the home State of each bank involved in the transaction has in effect a law described in .June 1, 1997section 1831u(a)(3) of this title

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: c Definitions
children.text: The terms “home State” and “out-of-State bank” have the same meaning as in section 1831u(f) of this title.1See References in Text note below.1
